python3 - <<'PY'
[?2004l[?2004himport json,glob,collections
[?2004l[?2004hk=collections.Counter(); ops=collections.Counter(); types=collections.Counter()
[?2004l[?2004hfor f in glob.glob('/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/*/*/answer.json'):
[?2004l[?2004h    try: data=json.load(open(f))
[?2004l[?2004h    except Exception: continue
[?2004l[?2004h    def walk(x):
[?2004l[?2004h        if isinstance(x,dict):
[?2004l[?2004h            if 'kind' in x: k[x['kind']]+=1
[?2004l[?2004h            if 'opcode' in x: ops[x['opcode']]+=1
[?2004l[?2004h            if 'type' in x:
[?2004l[?2004h                try: types[x['type']['qualType']]+=1
[?2004l[?2004h                except Exception: pass
[?2004l[?2004h            for v in x.values(): walk(v)
[?2004l[?2004h        elif isinstance(x,list):
[?2004l[?2004h            for v in x: walk(v)
[?2004l[?2004h    walk(data)
[?2004l[?2004hprint('kinds'); print('\n'.join(f'{v} {n}' for n,v in k.most_common()))
[?2004l[?2004hprint('ops'); print('\n'.join(f'{v} {n}' for n,v in ops.most_common()))
[?2004l[?2004hprint('types top'); print('\n'.join(f'{v} {n}' for n,v in types.most_common(30)))
[?2004l[?2004hPY
